title: ERROR: Failed to resolve identifier - weird behaviour

features.name: unpacked array as index into another array in generate-for
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop where an unpacked array (fifo_head) is used as an index into another unpacked array (fifo_next)

features.name: mixed procedural and continuous assignment to shared arrays
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array assigned in both an always block procedural statement and a generate continuous assignment
